name: Medium Natural Wood Kids' Storage with Lid Navy - Pillowfort™
description: Add extra organization space to your child's room while keeping it looking beautiful with this Medium Natural Wood Storage with Lid from Pillowfort™. Crafted from natural wood with brown hues, this rectangular storage box features a curved bottom for added style, and comes with a contrasting blue lid to liven up the look while helping to keep the contents hidden. This lidded storage box offers versatile placement from shelves to tabletop and more, and is designed with side cutouts to make it easy to move from one place to another. Simply add storage boxes of varying sizes to create a cohesive look while adding plenty of organization space to their room.
